findings.evidence: `rg -n "HilleYosida|BernsteinChafai" code/TauCeti/Analysis/CompletelyMonotone/BernsteinMeasures.lean` has no hits; the adapted proof targets are present as `chafaiRescaled_integral_bernsteinKernel_eq_sub_tendsto_atTop` at line 1249 and `integral_bernsteinKernel_sub_laplaceKernel_tendsto_zero_of_mass_bound` listed at lines 54-55.
findings.fix: Add an explicit reference/credit bullet in this file’s `## References` block naming the Hille--Yosida `BernsteinChafai.lean` formalization and the adapted proof components.
findings.issue: The reference block for the Chafaï reconstruction and kernel-convergence infrastructure omits the formal source `HilleYosida/BernsteinChafai.lean`, even though the PR description says the Lean proofs of `chafai_identity` and Bernstein-to-Laplace kernel convergence were adapted from it.

summary: The roadmap and classical/Chafaï sources are now credited in the relevant file headers, but the code still omits the formal Hille–Yosida source that the PR description says supplied adapted Lean proofs.
